title: Specify diagnostic report envelope (v1)
description: Envelope schema validated before stdout emit by every diagnostic surface — `specrun lint --format json` and the workflow-gating validate surface alike — for the `DiagnosticReport` envelope. The `version` field is the discriminant any future consumer keys on; widening the envelope (new top-level fields, new `summary` keys) is a `version: 2` change and requires updating both this schema and at least one round-trip consumer fixture in the same PR. The inner `Diagnostic[]` element shape is owned by `diagnostic.schema.json`.

version.description: Per `DiagnosticReport` envelope — envelope version discriminant. v1 is the shape defined by this schema.

summary.description: Per `DiagnosticReport` envelope — diagnostic tally by severity. Keys mirror the closed severity enum.

findings.description: Per `DiagnosticReport` envelope — byte-stable list of structured diagnostics. Element shape is governed by `diagnostic.schema.json` (relative `$ref` resolved against this schema's directory).
